conversation.user: Retaking orgo. Failed because of mechanisms last time. Same McMurry Ch.10-15 (180 pages). Exam in 2 weeks. I know some of it already. 1.5 hours a day.

mustAsk: Which mechanisms specifically weak? (SN1/SN2? Elimination? Addition?)

strategy: Day 1-9: 50% scan reading (known content fast), 40% mechanism drill (stop and draw), 10% blind recall self-test
Day 10-13: mechanism drill by type — SN1/SN2/E1/E2/addition/oxidation
Day 14: timed mock test under exam conditions
warnings: 'Familiarity illusion' risk: reading feels easy but drawing mechanisms on exam is different skill
Mechanism drill must be ≥40% of time — failure reason from last attempt
